title: Human — 2026-04-13T14:04:31
body_text:
nice, that comes through fine, all changes got applied, thank you.

so lets write some kind of a summary of the design brief for a settlers category, the base to work from is the intricate dock offset category, thats where we did the lookdev, seems to be working quite fine to clone it.

can you write a summary of the look and style and how it should be, according to what the intricate dock offset category is like, and what you took into account when you cloned it over to the about node

notably the about node section has an additional color palette feature which should be in the base brief as well.  and then place that .md with our other documentations in intricate/Documents/

following that we add and remove documentation in there all the time, so its worth making the info category in intricates sidebar to be dynamically built on app restart to list whatever documents are in there, currently we have those info buttons hard coded to specific cases
